recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: A hiking trip into the wild turns into a desperate bid for survival for five friends on the run from a mysterious shooter.

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.

recommendations.title: Les Petits Princes
recommendations.overview: JB suffers from a heart malformation .He falsifies his medical file ,so that he can enter a top athlete training center.

recommendations.title: Bird Box
recommendations.overview: Five years after an ominous unseen presence drives most of society to suicide, a survivor and her two children make a desperate bid to reach safety.

recommendations.title: Pet
recommendations.overview: A man bumps into an old crush and becomes obsessed. After several failed attempts at winning her over, he kidnaps her and holds her captive underneath the animal shelter where he works.

recommendations.title: Operator
recommendations.overview: When the daughter of veteran 911 call center operator Pamela, and her estranged husband Jeremy, a Senior Police Officer, is kidnapped and held hostage, they are left desperate, with no choice but to follow the kidnapper's rules: send messages through

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Elena
recommendations.overview: After suffering from a heart attack, a wealthy elderly Russian man plans to will most of his estate to his estranged daughter, but his titular wife has other plans.

recommendations.title: No Date, No Signature
recommendations.overview: Kaveh Nariman is a Doctor in the medical examiner's office. One day at his work he meets a corpse which is very familiar to him.

recommendations.title: Wildcat
recommendations.overview: An ex-black ops team reunite to pull off a desperate heist in order to save the life of their leader’s eight-year-old daughter.
